name: Rokid Connect HUD
summary: Navigation HUD App for Phone (korean ver)
description: A companion app that mirrors your smartphone's navigation (TMap, Naver Map) as a HUD on your Rokid Glasses. Install this version on your Android phone. It must be paired with the Glasses-side HUD app for full functionality.

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
A companion app that mirrors your smartphone's navigation (TMap, Naver Map) as a **HUD on your Rokid Glasses**.
Install this version on your **Android phone**. It must be paired with the **Glasses-side HUD app** for full functionality.

### Usage / Controls

- **Connect:** Select **'Connect'** in the phone app menu.
- **Start Mirroring:** Press the large **'Mirroring'** button.
- **Preferences:** Adjust layouts, mirroring areas, and opacity in the settings.

releases.notes: Full Size option added to screen size settings. Supports full-screen mirroring of the phone.

author: EUNG SOFT
